betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6White Phosphorus§f

§aA volatile, waxy allotrope that glows and burns the player when held.§f

White phosphorus (WP) is rarer than red phosphorus. It has a 10% chance to drop from Nether phosphorus ore, or can be obtained by centrifuging the ore or phosphorus crystals.

§6Production§f:
§b• Mining§f: 10% from Nether phosphorus ore
§b• Centrifuge§f: Nether phosphorus ore → 2 blaze powder + 2 red phosphorus + 1 WP + netherrack
§b• Centrifuge§f: Phosphorus crystals → 6 red phosphorus + 2 WP + 2 blaze powder

§6Uses§f:
§b• WP Ammunition§f: applies "Phosphorus Burns" — damages directly, water only temporarily stops it

§c⚠ Burns the player when held. Not pyrophoric (won't ignite inventory), but direct contact damages you.
